rules: Use tight tracking (tracking-tight) for all headings > 24px.
Use generous leading (leading-relaxed) for body text.
Use white backgrounds for 90% of the site.
Use Slate 50-100 for subtle section separation.
Primary color is for Buttons and Links ONLY.
Avoid perfect symmetry. Use col-span-2 vs col-span-1 to create rhythm.
Always use adequate gap (gap-6 or gap-8).
Containers with borders MUST have internal padding (p-6 or p-8).

containers.card_style: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-none hover:shadow-xl transition-shadow duration-300

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-bold tracking-wide shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-primary border-2 border-primary hover:bg-primary/5 rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-bold tracking-wide transition-all
buttons.ghost: text-slate-600 hover:text-primary hover:bg-slate-50 px-6 py-3 rounded-none font-medium

inputs.default: h-14 bg-white border-2 border-slate-200 focus:border-primary focus:ring-0 rounded-none px-4 text-lg placeholder:text-slate-400

artisan_profile.style: bg-white border border-slate-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 group
artisan_profile.image_aspect: aspect-[4/3] object-cover w-full grayscale group-hover:grayscale-0 transition-all duration-500

navigation.navbar: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-slate-100 h-20 flex items-center justify-between px-6 md:px-12
navigation.logo_area: w-40 h-10 bg-slate-100 flex items-center justify-center text-slate-400 text-xs tracking-widest uppercase border border-dashed border-slate-300

assets.icons: Use Lucide React or Phosphor Icons (Regular weight) for a technical look.

universal_guidelines: No gradients. Use flat colors or subtle noise textures.
No rounded corners on buttons or cards (or max 2px). Keep it industrial and sharp.
Use massive whitespace. Don't be afraid of empty space.
All text must be legible. WCAG AA standard.
Images should be desaturated or high-contrast to match the 'Blue Mill' aesthetic.
Do NOT use 'Inter' font. Use 'Chivo' for headings and 'Public Sans' for body.

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. Configure Tailwind with 'Chivo' and 'Public Sans' font families.
3. Build the 'Hero' section with the 'Tetris' grid layout.
4. Create the 'Artisan Card' component with the specified hover effects.
5. Ensure the 'Admin Dashboard' is clean, dense, and uses a table layout.
6. Use the provided image URLs for placeholders.
